sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107322" key="u(perbath/rios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπερβᾰτ-ήριος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n107322.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">for passing over,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὑπερβατήρια θύειν</foreign> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἱερά</foreign>) <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1620.tlg001:1:10:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polyaen.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.10.1</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">διαβατήρια.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
